name: Bran for Flour Substitute
recipeInstructions:
Fibre up your Baking in 4 Easy Steps:
1. Look at chart to determine the amount of bran cereal flour needed for your recipe.
2. Grind Post 100% Bran Cereal in blender or food processor for 60 to 90 seconds on high speed until a flour-like consistency (some coarse pieces may remain). Now you've got bran cereal flour.
3. Measure the bran cereal flour needed for your recipe after it has been ground. Note: You can substitute up to 1/4 of all-purpose flour called for in your recipe with bran cereal flour.
4. Mix the bran cereal flour and all-purpose flour for your recipe, then simply follow your recipe's directions.
Flour Bran Flour + All-Purpose Flour
